page.title: Total control of your clients and plans
page.subtitle: Register, query, and manage every client in your ISP from a single panel. Complete history, service statuses, and advanced filters.

quickRegistration.title: Quick registration
quickRegistration.description: Register new clients with all their information in seconds. Assign plans, zones, and routers from the same form.

advancedFilters.title: Advanced filters
advancedFilters.description: Filter clients by plan, status, zone, router, or due date. Find any client in one click.

completeHistory.title: Complete history
completeHistory.description: Access the full history of payments, plan changes, suspensions, and reconnections for each client.

serviceStatus.title: Service statuses
serviceStatus.description: Manage statuses: active, suspended, cut, or retired. Changes sync automatically with MikroTik.
